meanings.definition: make or work out a plan for; devise
examples: They contrived to murder their boss

meanings.definition: plan something for a specific role or purpose or effect
examples: This room is not designed for work

meanings.definition: create the design for; create or execute in an artistic or highly skilled manner
make a design of; plan out in systematic, often graphic form
examples: plan the new wing of the museum
Dupont designs for the house of Chanel

meanings.definition: conceive or fashion in the mind; invent
examples: She designed a good excuse for not attending classes that day

meanings.definition: intend or have as a purpose
examples: She designed to go far in the world of business

meanings.definition: done or made or performed with purpose and intent; - Havelock Ellis
examples: style...is more than the deliberate and designed creation
